signals.headline: Cavaliers Lead Raptors 2-0 After Game 2 Win | YES Cavaliers Will Win Series | HIGH Confidence** [1][2][3]
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Lead Raptors 2-0 After Game 2 Win | YES Cavaliers Will Win Series | HIGH Confidence** [1][2][3]

The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 on April 21, 2026, taking a commanding **2-0 series lead** in their Eastern Conference first-round playoff matchup, with Game 3 set for Thursday in Toronto.[1][2][3] Donovan Mitchell scored 30 points, James Harden added 28
